2604.19564.title: EgoSelf: From Memory to Personalized Egocentric Assistant
2604.19564.paper_summary: Egocentric assistants often rely on first-person view data to capture user behavior and context for personalized services. Since different users exhibit distinct habits, preferences, and routines, such personalization is essential for truly effective assistance. However, effectively integrating long-term user data for personalization remains a key challenge. To address this, we introduce EgoSelf, a system that includes a graph-based interaction memory constructed from past observations and a dedicated learning task for personalization. The memory captures temporal and semantic relationships among interaction events and entities, from which user-specific profiles are derived. The personalized learning task is formulated as a prediction problem where the model predicts possible future interactions from individual user's historical behavior recorded in the graph. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of EgoSelf as a personalized egocentric assistant. Code is available at https://abie-e.github.io/EgoSelf/.
2604.19564.paper_summary_zh: 自我中心的助手通常依賴第一人稱視角數據來捕捉用戶行為和上下文，以提供個性化服務。由於不同的用戶展現出不同的習慣、偏好和日常作息，這種個性化對於真正有效的協助至關重要。然而，有效整合長期用戶數據以實現個性化仍然是一個關鍵挑戰。為了解決這個問題，我們引入了EgoSelf，一個系統，包含一個基於圖的互動記憶，該記憶是根據過去的觀察構建的，並且有一個專門的學習任務用於個性化。該記憶捕捉了互動事件和實體之間的時間和語義關係，從中衍生出用戶特定的檔案。個性化學習任務被公式化為一個預測問題，模型從個別用戶在圖中記錄的歷史行為中預測可能的未來互動。大量實驗證明了EgoSelf作為個性化自我中心助手的有效性。代碼可在 https://abie-e.github.io/EgoSelf/ 獲得。
2604.19564.author: Yanshuo Wang et.al.
2604.19564.authors: Yanshuo Wang, Yuan Xu, Xuesong Li, Jie Hong, Yizhou Wang, Chang Wen Chen, Wentao Zhu
